actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: To keep moving forward, we must keep our feet moving.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: To keep moving forward, we must keep our feet moving.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes we have to take a step backwards before we can advance forward.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We have to be quick on our feet to avoid setbacks.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Discipline and coordination are key to success.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes we'll stumble over each other as we move forward together.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We can succeed on our own, but we still have to make all the right moves.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes we'll have to move in opposite directions to complete our goal.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Handling a crisis with grace and elegance is sure to pay dividends.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We'll keep our eyes open and step forward together.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We'll keep our eyes open and step forward together.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We must watch our step to avoid tumbling over each other.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We can succeed alone or in a group, but we must be aware of our surroundings.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We won't reach our objective if we stand still.
